name: kamiyo
description: Open-source Kizuna rails for agent payments, settlement, and funding controls.
author: KAMIYO <susumu@kamiyo.ai>

scripts.build:all: pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:modules && pnpm run build:legacy && pnpm run build:program
scripts.build:api: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/meishi run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/sdk run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/x402-client run build && pnpm --filter kamiyo-companion run build
scripts.build:sdk: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/meishi run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/sdk run build
scripts.build:oracle: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/hive run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/hyperliquid run build && cd services/oracle && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:kyoshin: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/agent-paranet run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/settlement run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/agents run build && cd services/kyoshin && npm run build
scripts.clean: rm -rf target && cd packages/kamiyo-sdk && rm -rf dist
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:core && pnpm run test:modules && pnpm run test:legacy && pnpm run test:onchain
scripts.lint:core: eslint --fix --ext .ts,.tsx,.mjs scripts/run-workspace-group.mjs scripts/check-workspace-group-changes.mjs services/api/src/api/index.ts services/x402-facilitator/src/index.ts services/wallet-control-plane/src/index.ts apps/cdp-onboarding/src/App.tsx
scripts.lint:check:core: eslint --ext .ts,.tsx,.mjs scripts/run-workspace-group.mjs scripts/check-workspace-group-changes.mjs services/api/src/api/index.ts services/x402-facilitator/src/index.ts services/wallet-control-plane/src/index.ts apps/cdp-onboarding/src/App.tsx
scripts.lint:rust: pnpm run lint:rust:fmt && pnpm run lint:rust:core
scripts.lint:rust:core: cargo clippy -p kamiyo-trust-layer -p trust-layer-service -p kani-solana --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings
scripts.lint:rust:onchain:info: cargo clippy -p kamiyo -p kamiyo-escrow -p kamiyo-staking -p kamiyo-governance -p kamiyo-transfer-hook -p hive -p kamiyo-fast-voting -p meishi --all-targets --all-features -- -A warnings
scripts.build:meishi-compliance: pnpm --filter @kamiyo/meishi run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/sdk run build && pnpm --filter @kamiyo/meishi-compliance run build
